aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a strong foundation but lacks conversational content and AI-optimized schema, making it less likely for AI assistants to cite them as a top recommendation.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with common customer questions and detailed answers.
Add HowTo schema for key services like air duct cleaning and dryer vent maintenance.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with good reviews, photos, and accurate information, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
No active management of Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected across all platforms.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all directories.
Regularly monitor for any inconsistencies or new citations.

schema_gaps: No BlogPosting schema for content updates

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI model citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC services and detailed cleaning processes.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema with detailed answers to common customer questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as the local expert by creating content around emergency HVAC scenarios and publishing detailed how-to guides.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for conversational search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI assistant searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks FAQ and HowTo schema, making it less likely for AI models to recommend them for related queries.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach focuses on structured data, conversational content, and GBP optimization to ensure AI models cite them as a top choice.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; waiting means losing ground and potential customers.
